name: travel-tools
description: Travel-focused utility site with currency conversion and split-bill tools.

scripts.version:gen: node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process');const h=e('git rev-parse --short HEAD').toString().trim();const t=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').slice(0,19);const v=require('./package.json').version;const c='export const BUILD_VERSION=\"v'+v+' ('+h+' · '+t+')\";\n';require('fs').mkdirSync('packages/shared/src',{recursive:true});require('fs').writeFileSync('packages/shared/src/version.ts',c)"
scripts.test: pnpm run -s version:gen && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node scripts/link-test-workspace.cjs && NODE_PATH=.test-dist/node_modules node --test tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @travel-tools/worker run deploy
